name: Incredible Dracula: Academy of Shadows
short_description: Join Dracula to stop runaway students, recover magical items, and restore order before a graduation ceremony begins. In doing so, you’ll face fears, conquer challenges, and finally prove that the legendary Count Dracula isn’t one to be trifled with.
detailed_description:
HISTORY:

The Academy of Shadows has summoned Dracula via an invitation sealed with an ominous emblem that stirs long-buried memories. As the newly appointed honorary examiner, Dracula must evaluate the academy's top students. But this will prove to be no ordinary task.

As the exam unfolds, chaos reigns! Dracula’s most feared memories have been unleashed. From menacing dolls to broken portals, mischievous students, and vanishing teachers, the academy teeters on the brink of disaster.

It’s up to you to help Dracula save the day. Rally a team, stop the runaway students, recover lost magical items, and restore order before the graduation ceremony begins. Along the way, you’ll face fears, conquer challenges, and prove once and for all that the legendary Count Dracula isn’t one to be trifled with.

Will you navigate through the chaos, or will you let Dracula’s past catch up with him? Can you put an end to the mischievous tricks and save the academy from ruin?

Play Incredible Dracula: Academy of Shadows and find out today!

Upsell Features

65 exciting levels

Step-by-step level guide

Catchy downloadable Original Soundtrack

Collection of rare cards

A collection of magic items

Achievements
